compounds.frequency: daily until desired tan, then maintenance with minimum 1 tanning session per week

benefits.description: Tanning with 1-2 tanning sessions per week

protocol_notes: User reports 15 years of peptide experience. Recommends 2-3 weeks for realistic results, not 4 days. Suggests 1-2 tanning sessions weekly with daily dosing until desired tan reached, then maintenance dosing.
